zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Ramsey於1396年出生在英國素福爾可簡頓時，她的父親Sir Ralph Ramsay Sheriff of Suffolk26歲，母親Alice de Walsingham22歲。她於1421年與Peter Garneys在英國英格蘭素福爾可貝可萊斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1460年在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾哈丁頓享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Ramsey于1396年出生在英国素福爾可簡頓时，她的父亲Sir Ralph Ramsay Sheriff of Suffolk26岁，母亲Alice de Walsingham22岁。她于1421年与Peter Garneys在英国英格兰素福爾可貝可萊斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1460年在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾哈丁頓享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ramsey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish, English, and Irish (Antrim): habitational name from Ramsey (Huntingdonshire, now part of Cambridgeshire), from Old English hramsa ‘wild garlic’ + ēg ‘island, low-lying land’. Alternatively, the name may also arise from Ramsey (Essex), probably from the same etymology as the Huntingdonshire placename. However, this is unlikely to be the source of the Scottish surname. This form of the surname is also common in Ireland, where it is probably in most if not all cases an altered form of Scottish Ramsay .

variants.name: Ramsay
meanings: Scottish and English: variant (the usual spelling in Scotland) of Ramsey . The Scottish Ramsays derive from Simund de Ramesie, recorded before 1175, who went to Scotland from Ramsey (Huntingdonshire).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Ramsey was born in 1396, in Kenton, Suffolk, England, her father, Sir Ralph Ramsay Sheriff of Suffolk, was 26 and her mother, Alice de Walsingham, was 22. She married Peter Garneys in 1421, in Beccles, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1460, in Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Ramsey est née en 1396, à Kenton, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ralph Ramsay Sheriff of Suffolk, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Alice de Walsingham, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Peter Garneys en 1421, à Beccles, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1460, à Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Ramsey 1396 in Kenton, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Ralph Ramsay Sheriff of Suffolk 26 und ihre Mutter Alice de Walsingham 22. Sie hat 1421 in Beccles, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Peter Garneys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1460 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Ramsey è nata il nel 1396 nel Kenton, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Sir Ralph Ramsay Sheriff of Suffolk, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Alice de Walsingham, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Peter Garneys nel 1421, nel Beccles, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1460, nel Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Ramseyが1396年にイギリススフォルクケントンで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Ramsay Sheriff of Suffolkは26歳，母Alice de Walsinghamは22歳であった。1421年にイギリスイギリススフォルクベククレスでPeter Garneysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1460年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアハッドイントンで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Ramsey(이)가 1396년 영국 수폴크 켄턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ralph Ramsay Sheriff of Suffolk(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Walsingham(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1421년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 베c클스에서 Peter Garneys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1460년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 하딩턴에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Ramsey nasceu em 1396, em Kenton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ralph Ramsay Sheriff of Suffolk, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Walsingham, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Peter Garneys em 1421, em Beccles, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1460, em Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Ramsey родилась в 1396 г. в местности кэнтон, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Ralph Ramsay Sheriff of Suffolk было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Walsingham, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Peter Garneys в 1421 г. в местности бекклесь, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1460 г. в местности хаддингтон, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Ramsey nació en 1396, en Kenton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Ralph Ramsay Sheriff of Suffolk, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Alice de Walsingham, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Peter Garneys en 1421, en Beccles, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1460, en Haddington, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 64 años.
